Hero.title: Buy Football Tickets
Hero.subtitle: Experience seamless ticket buying. Our smart AI fraud detection system protects 100% of your transactions.

TopLeagues.desc: Browse matches from the world's most popular football leagues.

WhyUs.box1_desc: Our proprietary AI engine instantly detects and neutralizes fraudulent tickets before they reach the marketplace.
WhyUs.box2_desc: Dynamic QR codes that refresh every 30 seconds, making screenshots and duplicates obsolete.
WhyUs.box3_desc: Bank-grade encryption protecting your personal and payment information on every transaction.
WhyUs.box4_desc: Every ticket goes through our rigorous validation process, guaranteeing entry to your event.

Promotions.description: Exclusive for Members. Unlock limited discount codes.

MatchesPage.no_results_title: No matches found matching your filters.
MatchesPage.no_results_desc: Please adjust your search criteria in the left sidebar.
MatchesPage.error_desc: Please check your connection and try refreshing.

Login.title: SYSTEM LOGIN
Login.subtitle: Initialize secure connection to TICKETSHIELD
Login.security_notice: AI security and bot protection active
Login.warning: WARNING: All fraudulent activities will be tracked by AI.
Login.forgot_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Login.forgot_success: Password reset link sent! Check your email inbox.

tiers.vip_desc: Courtside seats with the most realistic view
tiers.economy_desc: Upper radial seating with value pricing and wide stadium coverage

SeatMapRadial.map_hint: Semi-radial seating with live seat states
SeatMapRadial.focal_point_desc: Seats wrap around the field in four ticket zones.
SeatMapRadial.summary_hint: Select an available seat to continue.
SeatMapRadial.summary_ready: Seat locked locally. Review the selection and continue to checkout.

PaymentPage.title: Secure Checkout
PaymentPage.subtitle: Transactions are protected with international standards.
PaymentPage.success_desc: Your tickets are securely stored in the system.
PaymentPage.anomaly_notice: TicketShield Smart Security requires identity verification before payment.
PaymentPage.anomaly_action: Please confirm you are not a robot.
PaymentPage.error_auth: Error: Session expired or invalid seat selected.

ProfilePage.title: Profile Management
ProfilePage.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account balance.
ProfilePage.email_note: * Email is used for identification and cannot be changed.
ProfilePage.funds_note: * Simulated adding funds, no real payment required.
ProfilePage.success_funds: Successfully added {amount} VND to your account!

HistoryPage.title: TICKET WALLET REGISTRY
HistoryPage.subtitle: Manage all your purchased tickets. Tickets are monitored by real-time AI to prevent counterfeits.
HistoryPage.empty_desc: You haven't purchased any tickets. Browse available matches to get started.
HistoryPage.error_desc: We couldn't reach your AI wallet. Please try again.

TicketDetail.title: TICKET DETAILS
TicketDetail.subtitle: View complete ticket information and manage your booking.
TicketDetail.qr_hint: Show this QR code at the stadium entrance.
TicketDetail.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this ticket? This action cannot be undone.

Footer.description: Vietnam's leading online football ticket distribution platform, secured by state-of-the-art technology, ensuring absolute safety.
Footer.address: Sports Urban Area, District 2, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
Footer.registered: Registered with Ministry of Industry and Trade

NotFound.title: NOT FOUND
NotFound.description: The link you accessed is invalid or the event has been removed. Please return to the homepage to continue browsing for tickets.
